'''lobaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:meandery|meandery]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meandery|meandery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lobaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lobarithi|lobarithi]] || [[word:lobariji|lobariji]] || [[word:lobarishi|lobarishi]] || [[word:lobariki|lobariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lobaruthuthu|lobaruthuthu]] || [[word:lobarujuju|lobarujuju]] || [[word:lobarushushu|lobarushushu]] || [[word:lobarukuku|lobarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lobaruthu|lobaruthu]] || [[word:lobaruju|lobaruju]] || [[word:lobarushu|lobarushu]] || [[word:lobaruku|lobaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lobarufthuf|lobarufthuf]] || [[word:lobarufjuf|lobarufjuf]] || [[word:lobarufshuf|lobarufshuf]] || [[word:lobarufkuf|lobarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lobarethe|lobarethe]] || [[word:lobareje|lobareje]] || [[word:lobareshe|lobareshe]] || [[word:lobareke|lobareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lobarothotho|lobarothotho]] || [[word:lobarojojo|lobarojojo]] || [[word:lobaroshosho|lobaroshosho]] || [[word:lobarokoko|lobarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lobarotho|lobarotho]] || [[word:lobarojo|lobarojo]] || [[word:lobarosho|lobarosho]] || [[word:lobaroko|lobaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lobarofthof|lobarofthof]] || [[word:lobarofjof|lobarofjof]] || [[word:lobarofshof|lobarofshof]] || [[word:lobarofkof|lobarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfthÃŸf|lobarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfjÃŸf|lobarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfshÃŸf|lobarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfkÃŸf|lobarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|lobarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|lobarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|lobarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|lobarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfthÃŸf|lobarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfjÃŸf|lobarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfshÃŸf|lobarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfkÃŸf|lobarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfthÃŸf|lobarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfjÃŸf|lobarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfshÃŸf|lobarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:lobarÃŸfkÃŸf|lobarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lobarÃḊthÃḊ|lobarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:lobarÃḊjÃḊ|lobarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:lobarÃḊshÃḊ|lobarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:lobarÃḊkÃḊ|lobarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lobarathatha|lobarathatha]] || [[word:lobarajaja|lobarajaja]] || [[word:lobarashasha|lobarashasha]] || [[word:lobarakaka|lobarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lobaratha|lobaratha]] || [[word:lobaraja|lobaraja]] || [[word:lobarasha|lobarasha]] || [[word:lobaraka|lobaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lobarafthaf|lobarafthaf]] || [[word:lobarafjaf|lobarafjaf]] || [[word:lobarafshaf|lobarafshaf]] || [[word:lobarafkaf|lobarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lobarasha|lobarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lobarshÃḋsha|lobarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lobarosha|lobarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lobarmusha|lobarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lobaryasha|lobaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golobarnkshÃḋsha|golobarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golobarnkrosha|golobarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golobarnkmusha|golobarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golobarnkyasha|golobarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lobabarasha|lobabarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lobabarshÃḋsha|lobabarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lobabarosha|lobabarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lobabarmusha|lobabarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lobabaryasha|lobabaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golobabarnkshÃḋsha|golobabarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golobabarnkrosha|golobabarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golobabarnkmusha|golobabarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golobabarnkyasha|golobabarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lebÃḊrasha|lebÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lebÃḊrshÃḋsha|lebÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lebÃḊrosha|lebÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lebÃḊrmusha|lebÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lebÃḊryasha|lebÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golebÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|golebÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golebÃḊrnkrosha|golebÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golebÃḊrnkmusha|golebÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golebÃḊrnkyasha|golebÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lobfarasha|lobfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lobfarshÃḋsha|lobfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lobfarosha|lobfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lobfarmusha|lobfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lobfaryasha|lobfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golobfarnkshÃḋsha|golobfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golobfarnkrosha|golobfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golobfarnkmusha|golobfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golobfarnkyasha|golobfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
